name: moodle-mcp
description: Give Claude access to your Moodle courses, assignments, grades, quizzes, calendar, forums, and notifications.
long_description:
Moodle MCP connects Claude to any Moodle LMS instance. Ask about upcoming deadlines, check your grades, browse course resources, read assignment feedback, and more — all in natural language.

Supports token-based auth (recommended) or username/password login.

moodle_token.title: Moodle API Token
moodle_token.description: Web service token from Moodle → Preferences → Security keys. Leave blank to use username/password instead.

moodle_username.title: Moodle Username
moodle_username.description: Your Moodle login username. Only needed if not using an API token.

moodle_password.title: Moodle Password
moodle_password.description: Your Moodle login password. Only needed if not using an API token.

tools.name: moodle_get_site_info
tools.description: Get information about your Moodle server and account

tools.name: moodle_list_courses
tools.description: List all Moodle courses you are enrolled in

tools.name: moodle_get_course
tools.description: Get sections and modules of a specific course

tools.name: moodle_list_resources
tools.description: List all downloadable files and links in a course

tools.name: moodle_list_assignments
tools.description: List all assignments in a course with due dates and grade info

tools.name: moodle_get_assignment
tools.description: Get submission status and grade feedback for an assignment

tools.name: moodle_get_grades
tools.description: Get your full grade report for a course

tools.name: moodle_get_calendar_events
tools.description: Get upcoming calendar events filtered by date or course

tools.name: moodle_list_quizzes
tools.description: List all quizzes in a course with attempt counts and dates

tools.name: moodle_get_quiz_attempts
tools.description: Get your attempt history for a specific quiz

tools.name: moodle_list_forums
tools.description: List all forum activities in a course

tools.name: moodle_get_forum_discussions
tools.description: Get recent discussions in a forum
